results.name: mephidross
results.description: A swampland found on Mirrodin. Home of the black locus.

results.name: meta gameplay
results.description: A card depicting how players commonly use it in combination with other known cards, e.g. Treasure Nabber to steal Sol Rings.

results.name: metalbending
results.description: An advanced earthbending technique invented by Toph Beifong.

results.name: metal claw
results.description: Claws worn as weapons or jewellery.

results.name: metalcraft
results.description: Effects when the player controls three or more artifacts.

results.name: metallic dragon
results.description: A type of usually good-aligned dragons from Dungeons and Dragons.

results.name: middle finger gesture
results.description: The gesture where you stick your middle finger out🖕. How rude!

results.name: midriff
results.description: The midriff is where the abdomen (abs) are exposed when wearing a crop top or some forms of swimwear.

results.name: mikaeus cecani (human)
results.description: Mikaeus, when he was still a human.

results.name: miles prower
results.description: AKA Tails, a two-tailed flying fox with a genius intellect. Best friend and sidekick to Sonic the Hedgehog.
